item.title: R to @DeItaone: source: https://abcnews.com/US/fbi-warns-iran-aspired-attack-california-drones-retaliation/story?id=130973820
item.description: source: abcnews.com/US/fbi-warns-ira…

item.title:
🚨FBI WARNS IRAN MAY TARGET CALIFORNIA WITH DRONES
The Federal Bureau of Investigation warned California police that Iran may launch drone attacks from a vessel off the U.S. West Coast in retaliation for American strikes. The alert said Tehran had aspired to carry out a surprise UAV attack on unspecified targets in California, though timing and details remain unclear.
Officials also flagged growing drone threats from Mexican cartels, raising concerns about potential attacks on U.S. forces and law enforcement near the southern border.
item.description:
🚨FBI WARNS IRAN MAY TARGET CALIFORNIA WITH DRONES

The Federal Bureau of Investigation warned California police that Iran may launch drone attacks from a vessel off the U.S. West Coast in retaliation for American strikes. The alert said Tehran had aspired to carry out a surprise UAV attack on unspecified targets in California, though timing and details remain unclear.

Officials also flagged growing drone threats from Mexican cartels, raising concerns about potential attacks on U.S. forces and law enforcement near the southern border.

item.title: 🚨🚨 FBI HAS WARNED POLICE DEPARTMENTS IN CALIFORNIA THAT IRAN WANTS TO RETALIATE FOR AMERICAN ATTACKS BY LAUNCHING OFFENSIVE DRONES AGAINST THE WEST COAST -ABC NEWS
item.description: 🚨🚨 FBI HAS WARNED POLICE DEPARTMENTS IN CALIFORNIA THAT IRAN WANTS TO RETALIATE FOR AMERICAN ATTACKS BY LAUNCHING OFFENSIVE DRONES AGAINST THE WEST COAST -ABC NEWS

item.title:
About 20,000 seafarers aboard vessels in the Middle East face serious security risks as the conflict continues, according to the World Shipping Council. CEO Joe Kramek said some crew members have already been killed, urging carriers to prioritize safety.
Shipping companies are pausing or rerouting services based on risk assessments as conditions deteriorate.
item.description:
About 20,000 seafarers aboard vessels in the Middle East face serious security risks as the conflict continues, according to the World Shipping Council. CEO Joe Kramek said some crew members have already been killed, urging carriers to prioritize safety.

Shipping companies are pausing or rerouting services based on risk assessments as conditions deteriorate.

item.title: Prison inmate charged with Huntley murder appears in court
item.description: Ian Huntley had been serving a life sentence with a minimum term of 40 years for the murders of 10-year-olds Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman.

item.title: IRAN CLAIMS IT HAS HIGH-SPEED UNDERWATER-LAUNCHED MISSILES: CNN
item.description: IRAN CLAIMS IT HAS HIGH-SPEED UNDERWATER-LAUNCHED MISSILES: CNN

item.title:
🚨 IRAN CLAIMS UNDERWATER MISSILES, THREATENS STRAIT OF HORMUZ
Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it has high-speed missiles launched from underwater, capable of 100 meters per second. Commander Ali Fadavi claimed only Iran and Russia have this tech and suggested they might be used soon. Analysts see the statements as deterrence signaling, highlighting Tehran’s naval capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil and gas route. CNN has not verified the claims.
item.description:
🚨 IRAN CLAIMS UNDERWATER MISSILES, THREATENS STRAIT OF HORMUZ

Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps says it has high-speed missiles launched from underwater, capable of 100 meters per second. Commander Ali Fadavi claimed only Iran and Russia have this tech and suggested they might be used soon. Analysts see the statements as deterrence signaling, highlighting Tehran’s naval capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz, a key oil and gas route. CNN has not verified the claims.

item.title: Iran has deployed about a dozen mines in the Strait of Hormuz, halting oil and LNG exports and pushing energy prices higher. The U.S. Navy has destroyed 16 mine-laying vessels but is not escorting commercial ships. President Trump demanded immediate removal of the mines, warning of military consequences if Iran fails to comply. Iran’s military says oil could reach $200 a barrel.
item.description: Iran has deployed about a dozen mines in the Strait of Hormuz, halting oil and LNG exports and pushing energy prices higher. The U.S. Navy has destroyed 16 mine-laying vessels but is not escorting commercial ships. President Trump demanded immediate removal of the mines, warning of military consequences if Iran fails to comply. Iran’s military says oil could reach $200 a barrel.

item.title:
BLS STRUGGLES WITH DATA COLLECTION AMID STAFF SHORTAGE
The Bureau of Labor Statistics has faced staffing shortages and a federal hiring freeze, forcing reliance on less precise estimation methods for price data. In February, “different-cell imputation” was used in 40% of estimates, up from 9% a year ago. Relief may be coming as the BLS posts job openings for price-data collectors nationwide.
item.description:
BLS STRUGGLES WITH DATA COLLECTION AMID STAFF SHORTAGE

The Bureau of Labor Statistics has faced staffing shortages and a federal hiring freeze, forcing reliance on less precise estimation methods for price data. In February, “different-cell imputation” was used in 40% of estimates, up from 9% a year ago. Relief may be coming as the BLS posts job openings for price-data collectors nationwide.

item.title: MACRON: IT IS OBVIOUS THERE IS A NEED FOR DEFINITION OF MILITARY AND POLITICAL OBJECTIVES ON WAR IN IRAN
item.description: MACRON: IT IS OBVIOUS THERE IS A NEED FOR DEFINITION OF MILITARY AND POLITICAL OBJECTIVES ON WAR IN IRAN

item.title:
GERMAN FM: STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKED, DIPLOMACY ONLY OPTION
German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul says the Strait of Hormuz is currently unnavigable, with no shipping movement and no protection available. He warns the blockage threatens energy security for Asia and Europe and says only diplomacy, not military action, can restore safe passage.
item.description:
GERMAN FM: STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKED, DIPLOMACY ONLY OPTION

German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul says the Strait of Hormuz is currently unnavigable, with no shipping movement and no protection available. He warns the blockage threatens energy security for Asia and Europe and says only diplomacy, not military action, can restore safe passage.
